title: Sašo Greiner
text: Home * People * Sašo Greiner Sašo Greiner [1] Sašo Greiner , a Slovenian computer scientist at Computer Architecture and Languages Laboratory [2] , Institute of Computer Science at University of Maribor . His research interests include programming languages , compiler and computer architectures , virtual machines , and evolutionary computation , in particular differential evolution as applied in automated tuning of chess engines.
